message:
fix(config): parse typed YAML values instead of storing everything as strings

Config set previously wrapped all values in serde_yml::Value::String,
so booleans, integers, floats, and null were persisted as quoted strings
in the YAML file. Parse the value through bool, i64, f64, and "null"
before falling back to String so the resulting YAML uses native types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
